description: Style NoteThis green top from femella is a casual wardrobe essential. With smooth styling and a relaxed look, you can pair it with a pair of shorts or form fitting jeans. canvas shoes will complement this look the best. Product DetailsGreen top made of blended fabric, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, chest hooded placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs and an elasticated hemMaterial and CareBlended fabricWash dark colours separatelyDry inside outDo not bleach or wringWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8” and chest 33”) wears a size M
